stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend canonicalized this declaration to nocallback, nofree, nosync, nounwind, speculatable, willreturn, and memory(none) in the combined 2,683-byte canonical IR artifact (SHA-256 172ae44a3b3f55425bb296f9f485ea08fe9f51dada6721d5a5fbf8b61cfd6d60).

stages.representation: typed call to llvm.nvvm.ff2bf16x2.rn(float high, float low) -> <2 x bfloat>
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend emitted exact cvt.rn.bf16x2.f32 once in the combined 1,286-byte typed PTX artifact (SHA-256 263e8020dcdc7ccbb25baeefba06104abde3cac5100e98d40f9304746992ef97). Passing high then low preserves the public first-argument-low lane convention.

stages.representation: PTX 7.0 emitted by the combined six-form typed LLVM probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the combined 1,286-byte typed PTX module at sm_80 and produced a 3,624-byte cubin (SHA-256 f12457bfc7cc44d96014d876f4705a6ddee14db8471828df74dec91d060ff929). cuobjdump contains all six distinct F2FP packed-conversion forms.

stages.representation: pure inline PTX cvt.rn.bf16x2.f32 with `$0, $2, $1` and `=r,f,f`
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained exact cvt.rn.bf16x2.f32 in the combined six-form production probe, with the public low/high arguments printed as PTX high/low. An independent typed call to llvm.nvvm.ff2bf16x2.rn, invoked with the kernel high value followed by the low value, emitted the same exact instruction and PTX operand order even though the normalized imported record has no named selections.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined six-form sm_80 packed-conversion probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,462-byte PTX 7.0 module at sm_80 and produced a 3,496-byte cubin (SHA-256 c92d92589eadec753288e74985a1775e3f822765bffb6a88746c4a31ccaf7b6d). cuobjdump contains all six distinct F2FP packed-conversion forms. PTX 6.5 rejected every form as requiring PTX 7.0; sm_75 rejected every form as requiring sm_80.

stages.representation: pure inline PTX fma.rn.f16x2 with =r,r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained exact fma.rn.f16x2 inline PTX in the combined four-form PTX 6.0/sm_70 probe. An independent typed call to llvm.nvvm.fma.rn.f16x2 emitted the same instruction at PTX 6.0/sm_70 and at its native PTX 4.2/sm_53 floor; sm_52 failed exact intrinsic selection.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined four-form sm_70 packed-f16x2 probe and assembled at CUDA 13.3's supported sm_75 floor
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,252-byte PTX 6.0 module at sm_75 and produced a 3,368-byte cubin (SHA-256 3f23db63edf3340a638d464a8423346292f17846bed5e8c921d01c03371a8633). SASS contains HFMA2, HADD2 add/sub forms, and HMUL2. The PTX 4.1 negative module was rejected for every instruction as requiring PTX 4.2 or later.

stages.representation: pure inline PTX fma.rn.relu.f16x2 with =r,r,r,r
stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM 22.1.2 backend retained the exact pure inline-PTX instruction in the combined PTX 7.0/sm_80 probe. Independent typed calls to the exact LLVM NVVM symbols emitted the same fma.rn.relu.f16x2, min.f16x2, and max.f16x2 instructions; sm_75 failed exact upper-group selection.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the combined three-form sm_80 packed-f16x2 upper probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the 1,163-byte PTX 7.0 module at sm_80 and produced a 3,496-byte cubin (SHA-256 5fa2890550ffe3793eadd967cc05c25b1bd9541c9a1404ef1ca2a67e7a9856f1). SASS contains HFMA2.MMA.RELU and the two HMNMX2 predicate forms for min/max. PTX 6.5 rejected all three as requiring 7.0; sm_75 rejected all three as requiring sm_80.
